prompt: Design a three-course menu for a rainy Sunday lunch for two people who have known each other a long time. Dishes only — no explanation.
response:
Starter: Cream of Tomato and Basil Soup with Grilled Cheese Croutons

Entrée: Slow-Cooked Beef Stew with Chunky Vegetables and Saffron Potatoes

Dessert: Chocolate and Chestnut Mousse with Whipped Cream and Toasted Pecans
